formatter_aggregator_complete: FormatResponse receives operation_result from parent, returns output to parent. Complete path.
conversion_notes: 6-child conditional dispatch with formatter. ParseAndValidateCommand validates, parent routes to handler, FormatResponse wraps output. All dataflow parent-mediated. SendMessage/GetHistory/CreateChannel/JoinChannel have 'internal leaf access' inputs (channels, messages stores) — these are data_sources, not sibling calls.
